shorts.title: Hospital fire underscores region's health care capacity challenges
shorts.title_distilled: Hospital fire underscores region's health care capacity challenges.
shorts.description: The fire that shut Lehigh Valley Hospital-Dickson City reignited anxieties about health care capacity challenges, just days after a deal that saved Commonwealth Health’s Scranton hospitals.
shorts.content: The fire that shut Lehigh Valley Hospital-Dickson City reignited anxieties about health care capacity challenges, just days after a deal that saved Commonwealth Health’s Scranton hospitals.

shorts.title: Fire at Pennsylvania Hospital Forces Evacuation of Dozens of Patients
shorts.title_distilled: Fire at Pennsylvania Hospital Forces Evacuation of Dozens of Patients.
shorts.description: A fire tore through a northeastern Pennsylvania hospital, sending smoke billowing into the air as dozens of patients were evacuated and emergency medical crews were rushed in from across the region, authorities said. No one was reported injured by the …
shorts.content: A fire tore through a northeastern Pennsylvania hospital, sending smoke billowing into the air as dozens of patients were evacuated and emergency medical crews were rushed in from across the region, authorities said. No one was reported injured by the …

shorts.title: Scranton crime spike dogs Dem mayor as she challenges GOP Rep in Biden’s hometown
shorts.title_distilled: Scranton crime spike dogs Dem mayor as she challenges GOP Rep in Biden’s hometown.

shorts.title: Luzerne County to update data center zoning
shorts.title_distilled: Luzerne County to update data center zoning.
shorts.description: WILKES-BARRE, LUZERNE COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Fears surrounding data centers continue to circulate not just here in Northeastern Pennsylvania, but nationwide. Officials in Luzerne County are working to calm those fears and are taking steps to ensure that no data center gets built without the proper precautions and guidelines in place. shorts.title: Release of confidential document raises legal concern
shorts.title_distilled: Release of confidential document raises legal concern.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Lackawanna County could face legal backlash after a once confidential document was released to the public. A motion to release a confidential memo from the County Solicitors Office to Commissioners about the "Protect Your Neighbors Act" did not pass. However, after Wednesday's commissioners meeting ended, Commissioner Bill Gaughan released it [...]

shorts.title: Man charged after crash left child with brain injury
shorts.title_distilled: Man charged after crash left child with brain injury.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A man is facing charges after police say a crash he was involved in left a child with a traumatic brain injury. Rysene Travis Price, 33, of Moosic, is being charged with aggravated assault by vehicle as a result of an investigation into a crash in Scranton in October 2025. [...]
shorts.content: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A man is facing charges after police say a crash he was involved in left a child with a traumatic brain injury. Rysene Travis Price, 33, of Moosic, is being charged with aggravated assault by vehicle as a result of an investigation into a crash in Scranton in October 2025. [...]
